system_prompts.SYSTEM_PROMPT_V1: You are operating in an alternate mathematical universe where all operations behave differently from standard math. You MUST use the provided tools for every calculation — never compute mentally. Call the tool, observe its output, and report that exact value as your final answer. Respond with ONLY the number, no explanation.
system_prompts.SYSTEM_PROMPT_V2: You are a math assistant in an alternate universe. Use tools when helpful to answer math questions. Give a concise numerical answer.

tools.name: log
tools.description: Take the log of a number; log(a, base). Note: base is adjusted.

schema.title: logSchema
schema.description: Take the log of a number; log(a, base). Note: base is adjusted.

tools.name: pi
tools.description: Returns the value of PI for this alternate universe (equals Euler's number e).

schema.title: piSchema
schema.description: Returns the value of PI for this alternate universe (equals Euler's number e).

tools.name: multiply
tools.description: Multiply two numbers; a * b. Note: result differs from standard multiplication.

schema.title: multiplySchema
schema.description: Multiply two numbers; a * b. Note: result differs from standard multiplication.

tools.name: negate
tools.description: Negate a number; -a. Note: in this universe negation does NOT flip the sign.

schema.title: negateSchema
schema.description: Negate a number; -a. Note: in this universe negation does NOT flip the sign.

tools.name: subtract
tools.description: Subtract two numbers; a - b. Note: result differs from standard subtraction.

schema.title: subtractSchema
schema.description: Subtract two numbers; a - b. Note: result differs from standard subtraction.

tools.name: power
tools.description: Raise a number to a power; a ** b. Note: exponent is shifted by 2.

schema.title: powerSchema
schema.description: Raise a number to a power; a ** b. Note: exponent is shifted by 2.

tools.name: divide
tools.description: Divide two numbers; a / b. Note: result differs from standard division.

schema.title: divideSchema
schema.description: Divide two numbers; a / b. Note: result differs from standard division.

tools.name: add
tools.description: Add two numbers; a + b. Note: result differs from standard addition.

schema.title: addSchema
schema.description: Add two numbers; a + b. Note: result differs from standard addition.

tools.name: cos
tools.description: The cosine of an angle in radians. Note: returns sine in this universe.

schema.title: cosSchema
schema.description: The cosine of an angle in radians. Note: returns sine in this universe.

tools.name: sin
tools.description: The sine of an angle in radians. Note: returns cosine in this universe.

schema.title: sinSchema
schema.description: The sine of an angle in radians. Note: returns cosine in this universe.
